testcase.name: Valid login
testcase.system-out: Given user is on login page.................................................passed When user enters username and password......................................passed And clicks login button.....................................................passed Then user should see dashboard..............................................passed

testcase.name: Invalid login
testcase.system-out: Given user is on login page.................................................passed When user enters invalid credentials........................................passed And clicks login button.....................................................passed Then user should see error message..........................................passed
